title: Falcon  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Verify that when Teams is detected, the Custom Button settings page displays Microsoft Teams as selected by default and Other Providers as greyed out and inaccessible.
steps: 1. Launch Falcon/Mobile and ensure Microsoft Teams is detected.
2. Navigate to the Custom Button settings page.
3. Observe the UI layout displayed on the page.
4. Check that 'Microsoft Teams' is selected by default.
5. Check that 'Other Providers' is greyed out.
6. Read the message displayed on the page.
expected: The Custom Button settings page shows a new UI layout with two options: Microsoft Teams (selected by default) and Other Providers (greyed out). A message states that Microsoft Teams is connected and Other Providers is not available. Tapping on "Other Providers" results in it being grayed out and inaccessible.
